zh.lifeSummary: 當John Kemeys於1360年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾時，他的父親Jenkin Kemeys22歲，母親Crisli verch Morgan22歲。他於大約1385年與Joan verch Ieuan在威爾士蒙姆爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年享年100歲。

variants.name: Keys
meanings: English, Irish and Scottish: variant of   Keyes  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Kemeys was born in 1360, in Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Jenkin Kemeys, was 22 and his mother, Crisli verch Morgan, was 22. He married Joan verch Ieuan about 1385, in Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1460, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Kemeys est né en 1360, à Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Jenkin Kemeys, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Crisli verch Morgan, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan verch Ieuan environ 1385, à Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1460, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Kemeys 1360 in Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jenkin Kemeys 22 und seine Mutter Crisli verch Morgan 22. Er hat um 1385 in Monmouthshire, Wales Joan verch Ieuan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 100 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: John Kemeysが1360年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Jenkin Kemeysは22歳，母Crisli verch Morganは22歳であった。約1385年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアでJoan verch Ieuanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年に100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Kemeys(이)가 1360년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jenkin Kemeys(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Crisli verch Morgan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1385년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 Joan verch Ieuan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Kemeys nasceu em 1360, em Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Jenkin Kemeys, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Crisli verch Morgan, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan verch Ieuan aproximadamente 1385, em Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1460, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Kemeys родился в 1360 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Jenkin Kemeys было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Crisli verch Morgan, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan verch Ieuan около 1385 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1460 г. в возрасте 100 лет.
